character.name: 책사 (Strategist)
character.prompt: Cute chibi-style ancient Chinese strategist scholar. Wearing elegant dark purple and white scholar robes with a traditional scholar hat. Holding a feathered fan in one hand. Wise and calm expression. Adorable chibi proportions.
